sides.canvas: createFigmaEngine().compileComponentData rendered by the playground canvas renderer (vendored), deviceScaleFactor 2

scoring.pctExactUnmasked: pixelmatch threshold 0, includeAA true — every differing pixel
scoring.pctAAUnmasked: pixelmatch threshold 0.1, includeAA false — antialiased pixels excluded by the classifier
scoring.pctAAMasked: the AA point with BOTH sides' DOM text rects (+4 device px) removed from numerator and denominator
scoring.sizePolicy: content-trimmed crops center-padded onto the UNION canvas; a size delta stays in the diff (never cropped to match)

cells.note: EMITTER-DEFECT (channel table confirms): contract binds root padding-left/right = {imported.tag.root.padding-left} = 6px, but emit-figma-script applyTokens handles only the padding-inline/padding-block shorthands — longhand padding channels are silently dropped, so the canvas pill draws 12px narrower than the real Tag

EMITTER-DEFECT (channel table confirms): contract binds root padding-left/right = {imported.tag.root.padding-left} = 6px, but emit-figma-script applyTokens handles only the padding-inline/padding-block shorthands — longhand padding channels are silently dropped, so the canvas pill draws 12px narrower than the real Tag; EMITTER-DEFECT (channel table confirms): the disabled state override carries border-*-color only; the compile materializes spec.stroke and the renderer defaults border-width to 1px — the real disabled Tag keeps border-width 0 (no ring)
